BottleneckSummaryText: City B can reopen refined_mana through Beta's guarded watch route when it needs a steadier restart instead of a full raid.
OpportunityReasonText: Dungeon Beta's Guarded Path is City B's safer expedition lever for restarting stalled processing while keeping the next dispatch window steadier.
RecommendationRationaleText: Use the Guarded Path when City B needs processors back online but cannot afford the Greedy Path's full recovery strain.
WhyCityMattersText: City B matters because restarting refined_mana is urgent, yet keeping the dispatch line stable decides whether the city can capitalize on that restart.
